decisions.title: adopt blue-green deployment for production releases
decisions.rationale: Blue-green deployment adopted in Q2 2023 for atomic traffic switching and simple rollback.

decisions.title: replace blue-green with canary rollout (5% → 25% → 100%)
decisions.rationale: Three H2 2023 production incidents caused by blue-green environment configuration drift (secrets mismatch, service discovery lag). Canary releases limit blast radius: 5% traffic for 30-minute observation, then 25%, then 100%. ~60% incident rate reduction in first two quarters post-adoption.
evidence: three H2 2023 incidents: blue-green configuration drift (secrets mismatch, service discovery lag)
~60% production incident reduction in first two quarters after canary adoption
